description: TinyLlama 1.1B F32 dequant, CPU attention, 140ms/tok avg
Qwen3-0.6B Q8_0 VERIFIED correct — matches ollama output word-for-word
v4: native _Float16, 1.18x faster than F32 at 2048x2048
v5: warp shuffle reduction, 2.26x faster than F32 at attn_q, 35-52 GB/s range
quantized weights on GPU: VRAM 4300→570MB, load 3.1→0.5s, same tok/s
QWEN3-8B RUNNING on RX 5700 XT! Correct <think> output. 0.8 tok/s.
GPU attention + GPU KV cache. Identical output. 140ms/tok. CPU RoPE still bottleneck.
phase 3 baseline: v5 kernel, 42.4 us/call at 2048x2048
exp 1: single-warp (32 threads), 8 elem/thread. 3.2x bandwidth gain
exp 2: multi-row (4 rows/block) REGRESSION — fewer waves hurts
exp 3: uint32 qs loads — no improvement, scattered x reads cancel out
exp 3b: dp4a+Q8_1 path — RDNA1 fallback slower than float path
exp 5: eliminate memset from forward pass, alloc_tensor vs zeros
exp 6: fused silu_mul kernel — saves 22 launches per token
exp 7: in-place residual add — saves 44 allocs per token
